sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ الْأَطْفَالُ الشَّاطِئَ وَلَعِبُوا فِيهِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Djeca su voljela plažu i puno se igrala.
sentences.translationEn: The children loved the beach and played in it a lot.

sentences.arabic: بَنَى أَحَدُهُمْ قَلْعَةً مِنَ الرَّمْلِ بِجَانِبِ الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Jedan od njih je izgradio tvrđavu od pijeska pored mora.
sentences.translationEn: One of them built a sand castle by the sea.

sentences.translation: Dođe val i obori je pa se djeca nasmijala.
sentences.translationEn: The wave came and knocked it down and the children laughed.

sentences.arabic: بَنَوْهَا مَرَّةً أُخْرَى وَحَرَسُوهَا مِنَ الْأَمْوَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Sagradili su je ponovo i čuvali je od valova.
sentences.translationEn: They built it again and guarded it from the waves.
